title: Southern Pacific 1293
summary: Southern Pacific 1293 is an S-14 class 0-6-0 "Switcher" type steam locomotive built by Lima Locomotive Works. It was dedicated to the City of Tracy, California, on August 8, 1958, by the Southern Pacific Railroad Company (now Union Pacific Railroad).
text:
Southern Pacific 1293 is an S-14 class 0-6-0 "Switcher" type steam locomotive built by Lima Locomotive Works. It was dedicated to the City of Tracy, California, on August 8, 1958, by the Southern Pacific Railroad Company (now Union Pacific Railroad).

Current status
After Southern Pacific retired 1293 in 1957, SP donated the locomotive for display in Dr. Powers Park in Tracy, California. It remains there to this day on static display, subject to deterioration caused by vandalism and exposure to weather.
